channel.title: Jeremydmiller.com on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Kafka Support Improvements in Wolverine 6.13
item.description: Wolverine 6.13 dropped yesterday with quite a few refinements to our existing integration with Kafka in Wolverine. We had, of course, probably fallen into the trap of just trying to make Kafka behave like a Rabbit MQ analogue. It was already on my radar to get enable more idiomatic Kafka capabilities, and a community request … Continue reading Kafka Support Improvements in Wolverine 6.13 → Link to article: https://jeremydmiller.com/2026/06/19/kafka-support-improvements-in-wolverine-6-13/
